meaning: vt.设防于,增强(体力,结构等)使坚强,增加,(酒)的酒精含量vi.筑防御工事
examples: Fortify your decision with a commitment.
Tungsten is used to fortify steel for cars.
It also helped fortify our market position online.
Joining the ACC will do nothing but further fortify the value of the Louisville basketball program.
We therefore need to fortify our national resolve for more losses before the situation improves.
